items.title_en: How the Iran war is hitting U.S. homebuilders
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何打击美国房屋建筑商
items.desc_en: A slew of building suppliers reported price hikes in April on everything from foam insulation and roofing to windows and doors.
items.desc_zh: 许多建筑供应商报告称，从泡沫隔热材料、屋顶到门窗，四月份所有产品的价格都上涨了。

items.title_en: Americans cut spending due to higher gas prices and see no relief in sight, CNBC survey finds
items.title_zh: CNBC 调查发现，美国人因汽油价格上涨而削减支出，但看不到任何缓解的迹象
items.desc_en: Pump prices have surged more than 30% to top $4 per gallon since the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran on Feb. 28
items.desc_zh: 自 2 月 28 日美国和以色列袭击伊朗以来，汽油价格已飙升超过 30%，达到每加仑 4 美元

items.title_en: UK Biobank health data listed for sale in China, government confirms
items.title_zh: 政府确认英国生物银行健康数据在中国出售
items.desc_en: The government said medical data of 500,000 people was affected but no personally identifiable information had been made available.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，50 万人的医疗数据受到影响，但尚未提供任何个人身份信息。

items.title_en: 'CAR' crash: Avis Budget stock plunge reminding some on Wall Street of GameStop
items.title_zh: “CAR”崩盘：Avis Budget 股价暴跌提醒华尔街一些人注意 GameStop
items.desc_en: Shares of Avis Budget Group, ticker 'CAR,' soared from under $100 last month to a record high near $850 in early trading Wednesday before a sharp U-turn lower intraday.
items.desc_zh: Avis Budget Group（股票代码为“CAR”）的股价在周三早盘交易中从上个月的不到 100 美元飙升至接近 850 美元的历史新高，随后盘中大幅掉头走低。

items.title_en: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders to vote on Paramount deal
items.title_zh: 华纳兄弟探索公司股东将对派拉蒙交易进行投票
items.desc_en: Warner Bros. Discovery will hold a special meeting on Thursday for shareholders to vote on Paramount's proposed acquisition of the company.
items.desc_zh: 华纳兄弟探索公司将于周四召开股东特别会议，就派拉蒙收购该公司的提议进行投票。

items.title_en: Kevin Warsh’s wealth shows how top family office employees can cash in
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 的财富展示了家族办公室高层员工如何变现
items.desc_en: Top family-office employees like Warsh can co-invest with the families they work for, thanks to favorable regulation.
items.desc_zh: 得益于有利的监管，像沃什这样的顶级家族办公室员工可以与他们工作的家族共同投资。

items.title_en: ‘Energy proof’ your portfolio: The stocks to buy and avoid as oil prices soar, according to HSBC
items.title_zh: 汇丰银行表示，您的投资组合“具有能源保障”：油价飙升时应买入和避免的股票
items.desc_en: HSBC analysts on Thursday outlined ways to 'energy-proof' a portfolio of European equities, reflecting their own positioning on the continent.
items.desc_zh: 汇丰银行分析师周四概述了欧洲股票投资组合“节能”的方法，反映了他们自己在欧洲大陆的定位。

items.title_en: American Airlines cuts 2026 earnings projections after surge in jet fuel
items.title_zh: 航空燃油激增后美国航空下调 2026 年盈利预测
items.desc_en: American Airlines cut its 2026 earnings forecast, becoming the latest airline to lower its outlook after a surge in fuel costs added billions to its expenses.
items.desc_zh: 美国航空下调了 2026 年盈利预期，成为最新一家在燃油成本飙升导致支出增加数十亿美元后下调预期的航空公司。

items.title_en: S&P 500 futures decline following another record-setting day for benchmark: Live updates
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数期货在基准日再创新高后下跌：实时更新
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite rallied to new closing records on Wednesday afternoon.
items.desc_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数和纳斯达克综合指数周三下午上涨至新的收盘纪录。

items.title_en: Trump's lack of focus on economy is spooking Republicans as 2026 election looms
items.title_zh: 2026 年大选临近，特朗普对经济缺乏关注令共和党人感到不安
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump has been posting a lot on social media about his White House ballroom, the Iran war, and Pope Leo XIV. Not much about rising gas prices.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在社交媒体上发布了大量有关他的白宫舞厅、伊朗战争和教皇利奥十四世的信息。关于天然气价格上涨的情况不多。

items.title_en: Comcast beats revenue, earnings expectations as broadband losses improve

items.desc_en: Comcast’s first quarter earnings were lifted by NBC’s sports slate in February, as well as fewer broadband customer losses than prior quarters.

items.title_en: Trump's net approval rating on economy and overall falls to lowest of his two terms, CNBC survey shows
items.title_zh: CNBC 调查显示，特朗普对经济和整体的净支持率降至两届任期中的最低水平
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump's overall — and economic — approval ratings plunged in the latest CNBC All-America Economic Survey.
items.desc_zh: 在 CNBC 最新的全美经济调查中，唐纳德·特朗普总统的整体支持率和经济支持率大幅下降。

items.title_en: These charts show how Iran's economy is in freefall
items.title_zh: 这些图表显示伊朗经济如何自由落体
items.desc_en: Tehran's hardline rhetoric belies a brutal reality facing the regime and Iranian citizens: its economy, vulnerable even before the war, is now in tatters.
items.desc_zh: 德黑兰的强硬言论掩盖了该政权和伊朗公民面临的残酷现实：其经济在战前就已经脆弱不堪，而现在却已支离破碎。

items.desc_zh: 该学区为约 50 万学生提供服务，正在寻求在大流行后减少对设备的依赖。

items.title_en: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
items.title_zh: Xbox 降低 Game Pass 价格，但结束《使命召唤》第一天的访问
items.desc_en: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.title_en: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
items.title_zh: 由于燃油价格飙升，汉莎航空削减了 20,000 个夏季航班
items.desc_en: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.
items.desc_zh: 由于美以与伊朗的战争导致航空燃油价格飙升，该航空公司是最新一家削减航班的航空公司。

items.title_en: EU decides on key €90bn Ukraine loan after pipeline deadlock ends
items.title_zh: 管道僵局结束后欧盟决定向乌克兰提供900亿欧元关键贷款
items.desc_en: The funding was agreed last December, but it has been held up in a row over Russian oil supplies to Hungary.
items.desc_zh: 这笔资金是去年12月达成的，但由于俄罗斯向匈牙利供应石油而被搁置。

items.title_en: US charges anti-extremism organisation over payments to informants in hate groups
items.title_zh: 美国指控反极端主义组织向仇恨团体的线人支付报酬
items.desc_en: The Southern Poverty Law Center said it would "vigorously defend ourselves, our staff, and our work".
items.desc_zh: 南方贫困法律中心表示将“大力捍卫我们自己、我们的员工和我们的工作”。

items.title_en: South Korean fighter jets collided due to pilots snapping pictures, report finds
items.title_zh: 报告发现，韩国战斗机因飞行员拍照而相撞
items.desc_en: One of the pilots has been fined thousands of dollars by the military to cover repair costs.
items.desc_zh: 其中一名飞行员被军方罚款数千美元，以支付维修费用。

items.title_en: Taiwan president cancels trip after African countries revoke flight permits
items.title_zh: 非洲国家吊销飞行许可 台湾总统取消行程
items.desc_en: Taiwan has accused Beijing of putting pressure on African countries to close their airspace to Lai's plane.
items.desc_zh: 台湾指责北京向非洲国家施压，要求其对黎智英的飞机关闭领空。

items.desc_zh: 冲突洞察组织（CIG）表示，其研究还显示了阿联酋参与的程度。

items.title_en: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
items.title_zh: 英国游戏偶像 Peter Molyneux 谈人工智能、他的最终创作和不断变化的行业
items.desc_en: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.title_en: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
items.title_zh: Meta 跟踪工人的点击和击键以训练人工智能
items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。

items.desc_zh: 这家受欢迎的消息服务公司在一份声明中告诉英国广播公司，它“断然否认 Ofcom 的指控”。

items.desc_zh: 随着蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 宣布辞去苹果公司最高职位，这些都是新任老板约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 面临的主要挑战。
